description: Two simultaneous event tracks shown side-by-side with a connecting timeline spine. Use for coordinated attacks, dual-branch releases, parallel operations happening at the same moment. Each track shows up to 2 events.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above both tracks, e.g. 'SIMULTANEOUS ATTACK'
fields.SYNC_LABEL: Center badge label, e.g. 'SAME MOMENT' or 'COORDINATED'
fields.TRACK_LABEL_1: Name of left track, e.g. 'CURRENT BRANCH (v1.x)'
fields.TRACK_LABEL_2: Name of right track, e.g. 'LEGACY BRANCH (v0.x)'
fields.EVENT_TIME_1: Time/date for left track event 1, e.g. '11:59 PM'
fields.EVENT_LABEL_1: Description of left track event 1, e.g. 'axios@1.8.4 pushed with malicious postInstall'
fields.EVENT_TIME_2: Time/date for left track event 2 (leave blank if only 1 event), e.g. ''
fields.EVENT_LABEL_2: Description of left track event 2 (leave blank if only 1 event), e.g. ''
fields.EVENT_TIME_3: Time/date for right track event 1, e.g. '12:01 AM'
fields.EVENT_LABEL_3: Description of right track event 1, e.g. 'axios@0.29.0 poisoned — legacy users also hit'
fields.EVENT_TIME_4: Time/date for right track event 2 (leave blank if only 1 event), e.g. ''
fields.EVENT_LABEL_4: Description of right track event 2 (leave blank if only 1 event), e.g. ''
